name: tavily-search
description: Agent-optimized web search: a synthesized answer, scored results, optional extracted page content, and single-URL extraction. Best out-of-box quality; free-tier API key.
author: PersonalClaw

x-meta.label: Tavily API Key
x-meta.help: Your Tavily API key (tavily.com). Leave empty to fall back to the TAVILY_API_KEY environment variable.

x-meta.label: Request Timeout
x-meta.help: Maximum seconds to wait for a search/extract response.
